Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 159 

INSULIN_OONP_COPAY_1M 

LABEL: Insulin Copay Out-of-Network Pharmacy — One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a one-month supply of the insulin drugs 
on this tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP). 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2024. The
